title: rubus derasus
intro: Rubus derasus, also known as the Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Rubus derasus include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Rubus derasus include reducing inflammation and improving heart health due to its high fiber and anthocyanin content. Herbal preparations of Rubus derasus can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
